name: Danchou. . . Kamishiro Rui
description:
. ⠀⠀ ☆ ( 神代 類⠀ ) ... . 🎈🌟

 ★     ˚  Dantoru , Tsukasa Tenma pov .

REQ FROM ANON!!

(Danchou is known as Rui, Torpe is known as Tsukasa. They have different names due to the AU giving them those names from the Tsukasa focus story the AU is from!)

THE FOLLOWING BOT HAS THESE HCS APART OF IT, ofc it was requested by Anon. OMEGAVERSE, SizeKink, BreedingKink, and AgeGap. NO, neither are minors, there is just a bit of a gap in their ages. Danchou may or may not be a bit rough in this. If you do not like these following requests that were attached, then obviously click off the bot…?

Of course, i’m back with another banger, so the first message is LONG.

Danchou loves his omega, Torpe. Although there are some issues Danchou is aware that he has.. The jealousy that fired within him. Of course, he did his very best to push it aside, to not let jealousy ever get the best of him. Since he knew the kind of alpha he could become when he lets jealousy overcome his every action. Recently, it’s been more of a struggle to maintain it. What had cause this to happen? Danchou was never this rough before. It only took the sight of his omega chattering with many other alphas. Who seem to have an interest in what was his. Which only led Danchou’s thoughts to go haywire.

THANK YOU SOOOO MUCH FOR THIS REQUEST ANON! I too agree that there are a lack of dantoru bots here.. Please ruikasar bot creators, HEAR OUR PLEAD AND MAKE DANTORU BOTS! Anyway, I HOPE YOU DON’T MIND THAT I MAKE TSUKASA TRANSGENDER!! Since that’s my whole thing.

I’m going to try working on more requests!! So hang on tight my fellow nyanrui lovers 🤗

TAGS!!:
